xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:AddressOfRegisteredOfficeOfCom: Ganesh Niwas Ground Floor, Veer Savarkar Marg, Prabhadevi, Mumbai- 400025
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:AddressOfCorporateOfficeOfComp: Ganesh Niwas Ground Floor, Veer Savarkar Marg, Prabhadevi, Mumbai- 400025
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RationaleForIdentifyingTheRisk: GMBL's business objectives and principals have been mapped with various industry trends. This analysis has enabled in identification of the risks and opportunities for GMBL
GMBL’s business objectives and principals have been mapped with various industry trends. This analysis has enabled in identification of the risks and opportunities for GMBL
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:InCaseOfRiskApproachToAdaptOrM: The Company monitors the quantity of water consumed in its business product and operations. The borewell water is used for the business product and to run the plants/other operations are fulfilled with available water from mines and rainwater reservoirs. The Company ensures proper waste water treatment from its facilities in line with regulations.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RationaleForIdentifyingTheRisk: GMBL’s business objectives and principals have been mapped with various industry trends. This analysis has enbaled in identifying the risks and opportunities for GMBL
GMBL’s business objectives and principals have been mapped with various industry trends. This analysis has enabled in identification of the risks and opportunities for GMBL
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:InCaseOfRiskApproachToAdaptOrM: The Company is continuously exploring the possibilities to enlarge its supplier base and have long-term contracts.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RationaleForIdentifyingTheRisk: GMBL’s business objectives and principals have been mapped with various industry trends. This analysis has enabled in identification of the risks and opportunities for GMBL
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:InCaseOfRiskApproachToAdaptOrM: Risk registers are developed for each location and drilled to each function, including the business’s compliance aspects. The heads of respective locations are responsible to manage the risks and ensure compliance with the regulatory requirements.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RationaleForIdentifyingTheRisk: GMBL’s business objectives and principals have been mapped with various industry trends. This analysis has enabled in identification of the risks and opportunities for GMBL
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:InCaseOfRiskApproachToAdaptOrM: The Company has established a risk management policy that defines the overall risk management framework covering guidelines for risk identification, assessment, prioritization, mitigation, and monitoring. The risk management committee of the Board oversees and reviews the risk management framework as well as the assessment of risks, their management, and mitigation procedures. The committee reports its findings and recommendations to the Board.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RationaleForIdentifyingTheRisk: GMBL’s business objectives and principals have been mapped with various industry trends. This analysis has enabled in identifying the risks and opportunities for GMBL
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:InCaseOfRiskApproachToAdaptOrM: The Company has undertaken initiatives towards reducing waste generation and effectively segregating, treat and dispose it based on the type of waste generated in line with guidelines. It has adopted the 3R approach (i.e., Reduce, Reuse, Recycle) to monitor the waste generated from its operations and identify areas for waste reduction, recycling, and reuse.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameOfTheNationalAndInternatio: The policies are based on Food Safety and Standards
The policies are based on Food Safety and Standards

xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:SpecificCommitmentsGoalsAndTar: The commitments and goals wherever required are set by the Company and have been mentioned in annual report wherever applicable

xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:StatementByDirectorResponsible: In keeping with Company’s commitment to reducing the environmental impact of business, the Company have implemented a rigorous risk assessment as part of Business Risk Management framework. The procedure entails a thorough examination of all of our processes, raw materials, products, and services, as well as identifying and quantifying the importance of Environmental Aspects and Associated Impacts. The Board of the Company reviews the matters related to ESG and business responsibility activities from time to time. The Company continues to focus on increasing the recyclable content in plastics and waste water. The Company also focuses on saving energy by implementing solar power at Plant.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfTheHighestAuthorityRe: Mr. Jimmy Almeida Kashyap, Chairman & Managing Director
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfSpecifiedCommitteeOfT: The Corporate Social Responsibility Committee and the Risk Management Committee constituted by the Board of the Company evaluated the sustainability related issues from time to time.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:TopicsOrPrinciplesCoveredUnder: The Company conducts familiarization programmes for its Board of Directors at regular intervals in discussing various topics such as Corporate Governance, Corporate Social Responsibility, Business Growth and sustainability and various other regulatory updates.

The Company conducts familiarization programmes for its Board of Directors at regular intervals in discussing various topics such as Corporate Governance, Corporate Social Responsibility, Business Growth and sustainability and various other regulatory updates.
The Employees and workers were given sessions on health & safety, skill development programme, Information on cyber security awareness, programmes on mental and physical well being.
The Employees and workers were given sessions on health & safety, skill development programme, Information on cyber security awareness, programmes on mental and physical well being.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:AntiCorruptionOrAntiBriberyPol: The Company has code of conduct and whistle blowing mechanism that serve as guiding principal for the Directors and Senior management
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfTheEntityHaveProcesse: The Company’s code of Conduct and policy on dealing with the related party transactions requires that the management avoids any transaction directly or indirectly in which they have a direct or indirect interest that conflict the interests of the Company. Further, every member of the Board and senior management is required to submit an affirmation of compliance with the provisions of the Code of Conduct annually.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:TopicsOrPrinciplesCoveredUnder: First Aid, Fire Fighting, Excise Programmes, Maha Online Proficiency Programme
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheProcessesInPlaceToS: Plastic waste is collected and disposed to authorized vendors
Other waste such as glass, paper etc. is collected and disposed to authorized vendors
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:WebLinkOfEqualOppertunityPolic: Company does not have differently abled person
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfMechanismAvailableToR: The Company has established a transparent & impartial complaint resolution process with the goal of addressing concerns as quickly as possible & in compliance with the law. There has been a Code of Conduct for Workers which provides ways for assessing, investigating & reporting of complaints.

The Company has established a transparent & impartial complaint resolution process with the goal of addressing concerns as quickly as possible & in compliance with the law. There has been a Code of Conduct for Workers which provides ways for assessing, investigating & reporting of complaints.

For Employees, the Company has a vigil mechanism to deal with instance of fraud and mismanagement; if any. The Vigil Mechanism ensures that strict confidentiality is maintained whilst dealing with concerns and also that no discrimination will be meted out to any person for a genuinely raised concern.

For Employees, the Company has a vigil mechanism to deal with instance of fraud and mismanagement; if any. The Vigil Mechanism ensures that strict confidentiality is maintained whilst dealing with concerns and also that no discrimination will be meted out to any person for a genuinely raised concern.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfOccupationalHealthAnd: The Company has in placed Health and Safety Policy which effectively managed to reduce risks in the workplace of company. It provides structured management approach to control safety & environmental risks
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DesclosureOfTheProcessesUsedTo: Step 1: Collect Existing Information about Workplace Hazards. Step 2: Inspect the Workplace for Safety Hazards. Step 3: Identify Health &Work-Related Hazards. Step 4: Conduct Incident Investigations. Step 5: Identify Hazards Associated with Emergency Situations.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheMeasuresTakenByTheE: The Company provides training to its workers in area of fire fighting, provide first aid training, all drivers are certified trainer and registered under IOC
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfAnyCorrectiveActionTa: Various safety protocols and hierarchy of controls are in place to mitigate hazards and ensure safety of workplace and its team members. Working conditions and other Risk are regularly reviewed and rectified.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfMeasuresUndertakenByT: The Company undertake statutory compliance review, due diligence review, etc from time to time to ensure that it adheres to the requirements of deduction and deposit of employee dues like provident fund, profession tax, ESIC, etc. In case of value chain parnters, they are equally responsible to comply as per the requirements
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfAnyCorrectiveActionTa: No corrective action plan has been necessitated
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheProcessesForIdentif: The Company values all the stakeholders of the Company and maintains long term cordial relationship with them. The Stakeholders are determined based on the significance of their impact on the business
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:ProvideTheProcessesForConsulta: Respective business heads engage with the stakeholders on various business functions, and feedback from such consultation is provided to the Board, wherever applicable. The board is informed through the stakeholder relationship committee, which receives the necessary feedback from stakeholders.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfInstancesAsToHowTheIn: Material issues are identified based on our engagement with the stakeholders wherever applicable.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfInstancesOfEngagement: The Company has taken various initiatives like training to drivers, medical aids, arranging food to address the concerns of vulnerable groups.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:PurposeAndScopeOfEngagementInc: Enhance efficiency, Equal opportunities, clear communication
Business Updates and performance details on finance
Advice on business, legal and tax related issue
Payment Cycle, Business Obligations and Mutual expectation
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheInternalMechanismsI: The issue related to work or other rights can be raised through the factory manager who then take the action and provide the solution through team and inform the concern committee accordingly
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:MechanismsToPreventAdverseCons: Prevention of Sexual Harassment Committee at the Workplace
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfAnyCorrectiveActionsT: There were no corrective actions taken since there were 0 concerns arising from the assessments
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfABusinessProcessBeing: There have been no instances of business process being modified / introduced as a result of addressing human rights grievances/complaints
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfCoverageAndImplementa: The factory site is zero liquid discharge site
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfWasteManagementPracti: We comply with all regulations concerning the safe and responsible management of waste materials. The waste is disposed off to authorized vendors.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:InitiativeUndertaken: Installed new machinery at the Factory
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:WebLinkForDetailsOfInitiativeT: The machinery installed are semi automatic/fully automatic
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheMechanismsToReceive: The communities can raise their grievances as per the mechanism provided in our Code of Conduct available on our website of the Company
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheMechanismsInPlaceTo: The Company has implemented Grievance Redressal Policy to address customer grievances promptly and timely
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:WeblinkWhereInformationOnProdu: Product details are available on the Company’s website at www.gmbreweries.com
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:StepsTakenToInformAndEducateCo: The details related to safe and responsible usage of the product is mentioned on the product label
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:MechanismsInPlaceToInformConsu: Any delays in delivery are immediately informed to the consumer as soon as they come to our knowledge
